headline: T-Mobile lifts a frustrating perk restriction for Costco members
summary: T-Mobile has been doubling down on boosting customer loyalty after several months of continued customer losses in its wireless business. As the company works to keep customers from flocking to its competitors, it is sweetening the deal for Costco members by removing a rule that restricted ...

headline: How Investors May Respond To T-Mobile US (TMUS) Fiber JVs And Satellite-Powered Broadband Expansion
summary: In late April and early May 2026, T-Mobile US reported first-quarter 2026 results showing higher revenue but lower net income year over year, announced fiber joint ventures expected to reach more than 1.80 million households by 2026, launched its SuperBroadband 5G-plus-Starlink business internet service, and expanded its T-Satellite emergency connectivity capabilities, including international roaming to Canada and New Zealand. Together, these moves highlight T-Mobile’s push beyond...
